definition:
1. the front-door, the door leading from the  αὐλή, (Homer); also in plural, (Homer) 
2. the space before a door , a kind of porch  or verandah , Lat. vestibulum, (Odyssey by Homer), attic 
3. metaphorically, Κόρινθος πρόθυρον Ποτειδᾶνος (Pindar); πρόθυρα ἀρετῆς (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
